# Daily Report — 2026-07-13

## Task Completed
Added `update_change_schedule_span` tool — PATCH cmn_schedule_span/{sys_id}.

Allows callers to update any combination of fields on an existing schedule span:
name, schedule (re-parents the span; resolves name → sys_id), start_date_time,
end_date_time, repeat_type, day_of_week, all_day, repeat_until, span_type.
Guards: empty-body rejected before any HTTP call; 404 guard on PATCH response.
Returns success, message, and normalised span details (day_of_week_label,
schedule as display value, etc.).

Registered in change_coordinator and full packages.
